_comment: One job record whose description carries literal U+2028 (LINE SEPARATOR) and U+2029 (PARAGRAPH SEPARATOR). str.splitlines() breaks on both, which would tear this single record into unparseable pieces; the merge oracle splits on '\n' only, so the record survives intact and its description is preserved verbatim. A conforming engine must reproduce this exactly.
